scripts.zip: npm run build:chromium && cd dist/chromium && rm -f ../../SecretsSanta-chromium.zip && zip -r ../../SecretsSanta-chromium.zip . && cd ../../ && npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && rm -f ../../SecretsSanta-firefox.zip && zip -r ../../SecretsSanta-firefox.zip .
scripts.xpi:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && rm -f ../../SecretsSanta-firefox.xpi && zip -r ../../SecretsSanta-firefox.xpi .
